_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and implementing model serving APIs, including input validation, output formatting, error handling, authentication, and versioning.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.550), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.544).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.519). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [administration, server] vs WIDAI-only terms [apis, authentication, designing, error, formatting, handling] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.897 (P=0.939, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.081 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (89.7%). "Skill in server administration." and "Skill in designing and implementing model serving APIs, including input validati" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.555 ≈ STS 0.519 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [administration, server]. WIDAI-only: [apis, authentication, designing, error, formatting, handling].

signals.detail: STS 0.519 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
